text: Eng. Rating when in E/R watch must

options.text: Frequently drink coffee to remain awake
Constantly monitor all machinery and indicators and promptly report any abnormality to duty engr

explanation: During an E/R watch, an engineering rating's primary duty is to maintain constant surveillance of all machinery and critical indicators. Promptly reporting any deviations or abnormalities to the duty engineer is essential for preventing equipment failure and ensuring operational safety.
